title: neoregelia johannis
intro: Neoregelia johannis, also known as the Christmas cactus or Aechmea, is a popular, low-maintenance houseplant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Neoregelia johannis contains medicinal properties such as flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to promote overall health and wellness, with reported benefits including stress relief, improved sleep quality, and enhanced immune function. Neoregelia johannis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support physical and emotional well-being.
